creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port misses a dependency on ruby, which seems to be required for
building. On adding USE_RUBY=yes, it fails with

[...]
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/devel/ocl-icd/work/ocl-icd-2.0.2'
  CC       libOpenCL_la-ocl_icd_loader.lo
  CC       libOpenCL_la-ocl_icd_loader_gen.lo
  CC       libdummy_icd.lo
  CC       libdummy_icd_gen.lo
cc1: warnings being treated as errors
In file included from ocl_icd_loader.h:30,
                 from ocl_icd_loader_gen.c:29:
ocl_icd.h:30: warning: expected [error|warning|ignored] after '#pragma GCC diagnostic'
ocl_icd.h:31: warning: unknown option after '#pragma GCC diagnostic' kind
cc1: warnings being treated as errors
ocl_icd_loader.c:40: warning: expected [error|warning|ignored] after '#pragma GCC diagnostic'
ocl_icd_loader.c:41: warning: unknown option after '#pragma GCC diagnostic' kind
In file included from ocl_icd_loader.h:30,
                 from ocl_icd_loader_gen.c:29:
[...]

on RELENG_9 (gcc 4.2.1). Can you please fix this?

Thanks
Marcus
